programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Confesiones
programme.desc: Frank se queda con poca información para encontrar a un niño desaparecido cuando un sacerdote conflictuado que podría ayudar se niega a romper el sello de confesión.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Pérdida irreparable
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Frank, el crítico más abierto de la comunidad afroamericana, el Reverendo Darnell Potter (Ato Essandoh), es asesinado, Potter debe dejar de lado su relación controvertida con la familia Reagan para obtener justicia para su hijo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Arizona a investigar una serie de crímenes metódicos ocurridos a mujeres, el final es desconcertante. Dentro del equipo también se vive incertidumbre porque Hotch puede ser el remplazo de Strauss quien murió en la temporada pasada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC sigue en Arizona investigando acerca de la vida familiar del sospechoso, el cual tenía un gemelo idéntico, pero la madre nunca se lo dijo a la policía.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un francotirador dispara en Dallas, la BAU investiga si el próximo aniversario del asesinato de Kennedy es un factor de motivación, pero descubrirán que en realidad va a matar la mujer de quien lo contrato.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un marine hallado en su garaje lleva a sospechar al protegido del FBI, Tobias Fornell. La investigación se intensifica cuando el sospechoso huye de un nuevo crimen. Ziva, mientras planea sus vacaciones, descubre una foto misteriosa.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga un crimen durante la temporada de Halloween, donde un asesino psicótico deja pistas sobre la identidad de su próxima víctima en la red.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs se enfrenta a un desafío cuando Vance le asigna un nuevo asistente novato para investigar un caso de robo a un banco. La tensión aumenta mientras Gibbs y su nuevo compañero tratan de resolver el crimen y superar sus diferencias en el camino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un sorprendente secreto sale a la luz cuando el equipo se ve envuelto en un juego de guerra, y uno de sus miembros enfrentará serias consecuencias.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Confesiones
programme.desc: Frank se queda con poca información para encontrar a un niño desaparecido cuando un sacerdote conflictuado que podría ayudar se niega a romper el sello de confesión.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Pérdida irreparable
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Frank, el crítico más abierto de la comunidad afroamericana, el Reverendo Darnell Potter (Ato Essandoh), es asesinado, Potter debe dejar de lado su relación controvertida con la familia Reagan para obtener justicia para su hijo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Genética
programme.desc: Cuando Eddie y Jamie se involucran demasiado en un complicado caso de adopción entre los padres biológicos y los padres adoptivos, piden a Erin que los ayude a resolver el conflicto sin ir a la corte.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Aún persiste
programme.desc: Cuando Danny acepta un trabajo extra como guardaespaldas para un ex convicto recién liberado que asumió la culpa por otra persona, aprovecha la oportunidad para ir tras el verdadero criminal.

programme.desc: Officers assist in rescuing a man from a rushing river. A suspect taunts officers during a slow speed chase. Officers assist a rescue team with the extraction of a man from his vehicle after a car wreck. An officer spots an apartment fire.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Officers organize a buy-bust sting. Racoons hide out in a woman's chimney. A man gets pulled over for soliciting a prostitute.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: A primera vista
programme.desc: La historia, basada en la vida real, transcurre en Nueva York y comienza cuando una arquitecta se enamora de un carismático masajista ciego.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: El citadino Ren MacCormack se muda a un pequeño pueblo donde el rock and roll y el baile están prohibidos. Su espíritu rebelde sacude a la población.

programme.title: Vaselina
programme.desc: ¡Vaselina es lo que quieres! Vuelve a la preparatoria con Pink Lady Sandy (Olivia Newton-John), el líder de la banda de chicos malos T-Birds, Danny (John Travolta), y un reparto para rocanrolear.

programme.title: Vaselina 2
programme.desc: Muchos de los personajes de la exitosa "Grease" regresan al campus, y los nuevos son igualmente memorables, en este tributo a las faldas tubo, la seducción y el amor entre jóvenes.

programme.title: Los tuyos, los míos, y los nuestros
programme.desc: Un almirante viudo de la Guardia costera y una viuda diseñadora de bolsos se enamoran y se casan, para la consternación de sus hijos, ocho de él y diez de ella.

programme.title: Juana Gallo
programme.desc: La verdadera historia de Angela Ramos una joven campesina que llegó a ser la cabeza de una guerrilla que lucho exitosa-mente contra las fuerzas federales del usurpador Victoriano Huerta. El pueblo la llamó por su fiereza “Juana Gallo”.

programme.title: Los Dos Rivales
programme.desc: Los Treviño y Los Guereña mantienen una rivalidad originada muchos años atrás. Por necesidad de dinero, el heredero de los Treviño, y la heredera de los Guereña, tienen que disfrazarse usando ropa del sexo opuesto para proteger y vender sus ranchos.

programme.title: ¿Por qué nací mujer?
programme.desc: Una familia se reúne para festejar el día de las madres. Ante tantos problemas, una mujer hablará lo que no ha dicho por años. Esposo, hijos y nietos escucharán su cansancio y agobio silenciado por la sumisión y la obediencia impuestas.

programme.title: Espérame en Siberia, vida mía (LAS)
programme.desc: El soltero y millonario Mauricio, cansado de ir de mujer en mujer e influenciado por su médico de cabecera, decide casarse. Sin embargo, su futuro suegro le pide cambiar su testamento.

programme.title: Capulina contra Los monstruos
programme.desc: Capulina lee historias acerca de los monstrous y cree que existen en la realidad. Está muerto de miedo hasta que descubre que son imaginarios.

programme.title: Capulina corazón de león
programme.desc: Capulina accidentalmente adopta un león de una tienda de mascotas, pensando que es un gato. Las cosas se complican cuando, encima de todo, lo toman por asaltante.

programme.title: Capulina vs las momias
programme.desc: Un taxista lleva hasta Guanajuato al sobrino de un científico que busca en las momias el secreto de la vida.

programme.title: Regresión
programme.desc: Ethan Hawke y Emma Watson estelarizan este thriller sobre un crimen en un pueblo pequeño que desenmascara un terrible misterio nacional.

programme.title: El juego del halcón
programme.desc: Dos amigos, un estudiante americano desilusionado (Timothy Hutton) y un drogadicto, venden secretos del gobierno a los rusos. Basada en una historia real. Sean Penn, David Suchet, Lori Singer, Pat Hingle. Dirigida por John Schlesinger.

programme.title: El caso de Thomas Crown
programme.desc: Steve McQueen interpreta a un sofisticado, pero aburrido magnate, que lleva a cabo un espectacular atraco a un banco y Faye Dunaway es la elegante investigadora de seguros que lo atrapa del corazón.

programme.title: El matador
programme.desc: Un asesino a sueldo que recorre el mundo entabla una inesperada amistad con un vendedor tras encontrarse en un bar de hotel en la Ciudad de México.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Bandidos
programme.desc: ¡Prepárate para una comedia de acción de lo más divertida con Bruce Willis, Billy Bob Thornton y Cate Blanchett! Joe (Willis) y Terry (Thornton), dos convictos, arman un plan para robar un banco… hasta que se topan con una ama de casa bastante excéntrica.

programme.title: Silencio
programme.desc: Silencio de Martin Scorsese cuenta la historia de dos misioneros que viajan a Japón en búsqueda de su mentor desaparecido en un momento en que el cristianismo estaba prohibido. Cuando son capturados, ambos hombres se sumergen en una peligrosa odisea.

programme.title: Evelyn (ESP)
programme.desc: Son tiempos difíciles en Dublín, Irlanda. Pero nadie lo tiene más difícil que Desmond Doyle cuando su esposa se marcha y el gobierno decide mandar a su amada hija Evelyn y sus otros dos hijos jóvenes a un orfanato.

programme.title: Casi un ángel
programme.desc: En una experiencia cercana a la muerte, un ladronzuelo tiene un encuentro con Dios y recobra la conciencia creyendo que es un ángel de prueba, que debe realizar buenas obras para conservar su lugar en el cielo.

programme.title: Cautiva
programme.desc: Basada en una historia real milagrosa sobre el poder de la fe, Cautiva es un drama inspirador sobre una madre viuda recientemente que es tomada como rehén en su propio hogar.

programme.title: Evelyn (ESP)
programme.desc: Son tiempos difíciles en Dublín, Irlanda. Pero nadie lo tiene más difícil que Desmond Doyle cuando su esposa se marcha y el gobierno decide mandar a su amada hija Evelyn y sus otros dos hijos jóvenes a un orfanato.

programme.title: Lucha de tentaciones
programme.desc: El ganador del Oscar, Cuba Gooding, Jr. interpreta a Darrin Hill, un ejecutivo de Nueva York con mucha labia y poca suerte que regresa a su ciudad natal para cobrar la herencia de su tía. Pero antes, deberá cumplir su última voluntad.

programme.title: Querido Dios
programme.desc: Greg Kinnear protagoniza en este espíritu-levantador sobre un estafador que va de nada bueno al hacer el bien.

programme.desc: Cuando una explosión sacude a Boston, el experto en escuadrones de bombas Jimmy Dove (Jeff Bridges) se ve inmerso en el trabajo más desgarrador de su carrera.

programme.title: Hombres de élite

programme.title: Top Gun: "Pasión y gloria"
programme.desc: Tom Cruise es el magnífico Maverick Mitchell, un joven piloto que está dispuesto a ser el mejor. Y Kelly McGillis interpreta al instructor que le enseña a Maverick algunas cosas que no se aprenden en clase.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: bajo la mira
programme.desc: Un investigador de homicidios se adentra en un caso que involucra a un francotirador militar capacitado que disparó a cinco víctimas al azar.

programme.title: Hombres de élite
programme.desc: En este tenso thriller protagonizado por John Travolta y Kate Bosworth, un equipo de trabajadores de líneas eléctricas de Texas se apresura a instalar kilómetros de cable antes de que una mortal tormenta eléctrica destruya la red eléctrica.

programme.title: La familia Monster

programme.title: La más grande historia jamás contada
programme.desc: La vida de Jesús en la Palestina ocupada por Roma: su nacimiento en Belén, su infancia en Nazaret, la última cena, la traición de su discípulo Judas, su juicio, crucifixión y posterior resurrección.

programme.title: Noé
programme.desc: Russell Crowe interpreta a Noé, en la historia llena de valor, sacrificio y esperanza. Esta impactante aventura de acción es aclamada como "una de las más inolvidables historias bíblicas llevadas a la pantalla". (Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times).

programme.title: El hijo de Dios
programme.desc: La historia de la vida de Jesús se cuenta desde su humilde nacimiento a través de sus enseñanzas, crucifixión y resurrección final.

programme.desc: Dusty (Mark Wahlberg) y Brad (Will Ferrell) creen dominar la coparentalidad… hasta que llegan sus padres y ponen a prueba su alianza en esta divertida comedia.

programme.title: Querido Dios

programme.title: Un película de miedo 3
programme.desc: David Zucker dirige Scary Movie 3, una película llena de actuaciones especiales divertidas e innecesarias, que se burla de las películas de terror, los éxitos de taquilla, y de la cultura popular.

programme.desc: En esta divertida parodia de una película de terror, un grupo de adolescentes son acosados por un psicópata enmascarado. Protagonizada por Carmen Electra, Marlon Wayans, Jon Abrahams, Shannon Elizabeth, Shawn Wayans, y Anna Faris.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Todo Incluido
programme.desc: Una familia de vacaciones se ve obligada a esconderse en su habitación de hotel cuando un huracán arrasa el centro turístico, donde pronto empiezan a revelarse verdades que han permanecido ocultas durante mucho tiempo.

programme.title: Divina confusión
programme.desc: Comedia mexicana llena de estrellas donde el amor de hoy en día recibe un empujoncito por parte de poderes de lo más alto.

programme.title: Antes que cante el gallo
programme.desc: Carmín, una adolescente, sueña con mudarse a la ciudad con su madre, pero sus deseos se desvanecen cuando se muda a los Estados Unidos con su nuevo esposo en un pueblo de Puerto Rico y su abuela.

programme.title: Todo Incluido
programme.desc: Una familia de vacaciones se ve obligada a esconderse en su habitación de hotel cuando un huracán arrasa el centro turístico, donde pronto empiezan a revelarse verdades que han permanecido ocultas durante mucho tiempo.

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: A la mala
programme.desc: En esta brillante comedia, una bella actriz perseverante (Aislinn Derbez) es contratada para coquetear y luego abandonar a un apuesto ex productor, pero se termina enamorando de él.

programme.title: Revelaciones
programme.desc: La esposa de un investigador universitario cree que su casa en el lago de Vermont está embrujada por un fantasma, o que está perdiendo la cabeza.

programme.title: El perfume: historia de un asesino
programme.desc: En Francia, en el siglo XVIII, vive Jean-Baptiste Grenouille, cuyo olfato es extraordinario. Pero cuando su don se transforma en obsesión, lucha por crear el perfume más excitante del mundo, matando a jovencitas para capturar su esencia.

programme.title: Freeway (ESP)
programme.desc: Intentando huir de su vida, la delincuente juvenil adolescente Vanessa Lutz se va a vivir con su abuela. En su camino, conoce a Bob Wolverton, un asesino en serie encantador pero sádico.

programme.title: The Cloverfield Paradox
programme.desc: Un equipo de astronautas estadounidenses en una estación espacial hace un descubrimiento aterrador que desafía todo lo que saben sobre la realidad, incluso mientras luchan desesperadamente por sobrevivir.

programme.title: Revelaciones
programme.desc: La esposa de un investigador universitario cree que su casa en el lago de Vermont está embrujada por un fantasma, o que está perdiendo la cabeza.

programme.title: La leyenda del jinete sin cabeza
programme.desc: Johnny Depp es Ichabod Crane, un investigador decidido a detener los asesinatos del Jinete Sin Cabeza.

programme.title: La hermandad
programme.desc: Edward Dalton (Ethan Hawke) es un investigador en el 2019, año en que una plaga convirtió en vampiros a la población. A medida que los humanos se extinguen, los vampiros deben encontrar un sustituto de la sangre. Un hallazgo puede salvar a la humanidad.

programme.title: Zorro
programme.desc: In the New World, a new Spanish governor finds the province of Nueva Aragón under the iron fist of the corrupt Colonel Huerta and vows to bring justice under the guise of a masked avenger.

programme.title: From Noon Till Three
programme.desc: Charles Bronson plays Graham Dorsey, a bank robber who, through a series of twists and turns finds himself the object of national adoration. A beautiful widow, Amanda Starbuck (Jill Ireland) is responsible for creating this myth.

programme.title: Breakheart Pass
programme.desc: As a train races through the Rocky Mountains, the passengers are being murdered! The only hope is John Deakin (Charles Bronson) who uncovers a secret that explodes in a torrent of shocking revelations, explosive brawls, and blazing gun battles.

programme.title: The White Buffalo
programme.desc: Charles Bronson and Will Sampson star as Wild Bill Hickok and Chief Crazy Horse in this one-of-a-kind western that finds both western legends braving the snowy wilderness in search of the demon that haunts them both, the fabled White Buffalo!

programme.title: Chato's Land
programme.desc: Chato, a half-Apache horseman, is on the run from a blood-thirsty posse led by an ex-Confederate officer, who is determined to see him dead. Eventually, the pursued and the pursuers will become reversed, thanks to the unforgiving, cruel desert.

programme.title: The Fighting Kentuckian
programme.desc: Leading a regiment of Kentucky riflemen during the War of 1812, John Wayne is the frontiersman who battles to save his love and his homeland from speculators, after the Battle of New Orleans.

programme.title: Buffalo Girls
programme.desc: Based on Larry McMurtry's best-selling novel which celebrates the bold escapades of Calamity Jane and her illustrious cohorts, as they travel the wild west in search of her long-lost daughter and the west they once knew.

programme.title: His Girl Friday
programme.desc: A newspaper editor uses every trick in the book to keep his ace reporter ex-wife from remarrying.

programme.title: A Funny Thing Happened on the Way to the Forum
programme.desc: Zero Mostel, Buster Keaton, Phil Silvers and an all-star cast scam their way through this boisterous romp amidst gorgeous girls, mistaken identities, stunning surprises, cunning disguises and great Sondheim songs.

programme.title: How to Succeed in Business Without Really Trying (1967)
programme.desc: This hilarious musical stars Robert Morse as a charming and scheming window washer who climbs to the top of the corporate ladder by way of a self-help book.

programme.title: The Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: A waning director revives his career after discovering a beautiful Spanish dancer and makes her into a Hollywood star. Ava Gardner, Humphrey Bogart and Edmond O’Brien star in this bitter tale of stardom won and wasted from Joseph L. Mankiewicz.

programme.title: The Desperate Hours
programme.desc: Bogart plays an escaped con who has nothing to lose. March is a suburban Everyman who has everything to lose - his family is held hostage by Bogart.

programme.title: We're No Angels
programme.desc: Humphrey Bogart plays one of his rare comedy roles in this jaunty excursion about three convicts - Joseph (Bogart), Albert (Aldo Ray) and Jules (Peter Ustinov) - who are plotting their escape from Devil's Island.

programme.title: Solomon and Sheba (1959)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner as the wise leader and singer of songs, Solomon, who finds his world turned upside down with the appearance of the wily temptress Sheba (Gina Lollobrigida). George Sanders, Marisa Pavan, David Farrar, and Harry Andrews co-star.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies are in for a comedy surprise when the small town kid Bobby befriends, Steve, lands a big role as Romeo the first day he arrives in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex tells Elaine that her hectic schedule of being a mother, a cabbie and a museum employee is driving her crazy and that she should see a psychiatrist. Elaine decides that a quicker cure would be to spend the night with Alex.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby and Tony’s friendship is on the line when they become embroiled in a hilarious love triangle and attempt to outdo each other in vying for the affection of a beautiful young lady.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The overweight blind date Alex once had returned to the scene a svelte shell of her former self, and eager for the romance she yearns for with Alex

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The riotous race of the century pits Alex against Louie in a winner-take-all bet to see who can bring in the most receipts. Lecherous Louie uses every dirty trick in the book to make sure he wins his prize—an evening with Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine suddenly starts getting mysterious love letters. When she becomes intrigued by the poetic propositions, a couple of cabbies quickly claim responsibility, leaving Elaine with the hilarious task of discovering who is the amorous writer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie makes a horrible first impression on girlfriend Zena’s parents on Taxi. Louie’s romance with girlfriend Zena takes an outrageous twist when she brings him home to meet her parents.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: After a family trip to the circus, Chip and Ernie pretend to be big game hunters and camp out in the backyard. It's all fun and games until they wake up and see a lion!

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Steve's advice for his sons to help out a child struggling in sports backfires when they learn of an unemployed relative who could use his help.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Chip has a crush on Mary-Lou but Mary-Lou only has eyes for Robbie. When Chip calls her to ask her out, she thinks she is talking to Robbie.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Ernie plans for Steve to perform with him in a father-son show at school, but Steve will be out of town on business.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Uncle Charley wins a contest and his prize is a dance lesson with the sweet-talking Helen, who manages to convince both him and Robbie to sign up for additional lessons.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: When Robbie is having trouble in track and field, his girlfriend suggests that he take ballet lessons. The lessons help so much that Robbie makes the track team but is to embarrassed to perform in the ballet recital.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Lately it seems like everyone but Ernie has a girlfriend -- even Tramp the dog!

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Steve has to go to Hong Kong on business and decides to take the whole family on a vacation.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: A series of implausible coincidences leaves the Douglas family convinced that Steve is getting married again!

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Chip's first time throwing a party for teenagers is a success...until the record player breaks.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Haney (Pat Buttram) takes Oliver (Eddie Albert) to Pixley Superior Municipal Court and sues him for non-payment of a vital contract over the little matter of some rain…or lack thereof. Does Mr. Haney know who he's up against? Does Oliver?

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The Third-Tuesday-of-Every-Month-Culture-Committee of the Every-Other-Wednesday-Afternoon-Discussion-Club decides that Hooterville needs some culture in the form of a symphony orchestra. And Lisa (Eva Gabor) may just know the perfect conductor.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver's (Eddie Albert) nephew Charles (Don Edmonds) arrives for a visit, and Oliver is completely shaken up when the boy turns out to be a long-haired, motorcycle-ridin', hippy-dippy type. But, boy, does he know a thing or two about engines.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver dreams of entering his crop in the Corn Festival, but the dreaded Bing Bug invades Hooterville's farms. After learning of his service as a WWII pilot, the locals volunteer him for the perilous task of flying the town's only crop duster.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When a lovely, young and successful farmer comes to Oliver (Eddie Albert) for his legal counsel, Lisa (Eva Gabor) quickly becomes jealous of the two spending time together and becomes determined to break up what she sees as a budding romance.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When the Monroe Brothers show up to fix the Douglas's closet, Lisa learns that Ralph is devastated because her true love has stood her up on another date. Lisa's solution: an intensive, two-day beauty treatment for Ralph…and the barn for Oliver!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) takes to his soap box, delivering fiery, patriotic speeches after getting a bill from the State Farm Unattached Duty Tax for an outrageous $12.03! But no one can figure out why the tax is levied in the first place.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa (Eva Gabor) is curious to learn about the book that Oliver (Eddie Albert) is reading. It is the real-life story of pioneers Gus and Etta Thompson. The episode flashes back to the 19th century with Oliver appearing as Gus and Lisa as Etta.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Eb (Tom Lester) seeks dating advice from the Douglas's after laying eyes on former classmate Betty Jo Bradley from petticoat Junction. Oliver's well-intentioned guidance has mixed results when Eb hilariously misconstrues the advice he's given.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The locals complain that Oliver's penchant for wearing business suits to do farm work is ruining Hooterville's image. Oliver tries to adjust, but the last laugh is on him when Lisa has her dressmaker design Italian him some swanky new overalls.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: At the request of his late son Hal's friend, Barnaby investigates a lodge owner who is suspected of murdering his wife.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: While investigating the death of a man bitten by a rattlesnake, Barnaby soon suspects that there is more than one snake involved...and it's one that wears cowboy boots and has a prison record.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A race car driver gets caught cheating on his wife by his brother-in-law, and in order to keep his indiscretions secret he resorts to murder.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A detective friend of Barnaby who is intent on catching a murderer, has been receiving letters from the man who is taunting him.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: When five terrorists whose plan to pass through a security checkpoint at a boating dock fails, they flee taking on several hostages including Inspector Steve Keller.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A troubled teen from a broken home is suspected of shooting a friend's stepfather.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A killer ends up working with a witness to their crime.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Lieutenant Michael Stone and Inspector Steven Keller investigate the murder of women. The murderer was wearing an officer's uniform of the United States Air Force.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Mike's former partner returns to San Francisco, but not because of any longing for the good old days. He is back in town to kill the hired gunman who murdered his son years before.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: "Why are firms owned by virtuous Japanese-American Yuhio Muromoto being bombed by a WW2 memorabilia collector? McGarrett tries to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Steve McGarrett is caught up in a series of puzzling murders immediately following the death of a famed artist whose estate seems to be the target of a killer.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A mystery writer examines strange occurrences in experiments with a cryogenics institute. (Cryogenics is the freezing of living material for preservation for future use.)

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Luciana Paluzzi plays an international news reporter whose unwillingness to reveal her source for an impending kidnapping creates an international incident involving the Middle East.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Wealthy horsebreeder's body found in cane field, widow says he was buried 4 months prior. McGarrett investigates 2-3 related murders.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: In this highly charged, fascinating tale that explores the concept of alternate dimensions, a wealthy industrialist (Barry Jones) attempts to contact his dead son by funding a scientist's experiments in prying open the door to the borderland.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: Ralph Meeker and Henry Silva star in this examination of the politics of exploitation as a corporate mercenary (Meeker) and a ruthless dictator (Silva) battle for possession of a recently discovered sea monster. But the monster may have other ideas.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When Dr. Sloan's wealthy womanizing patient, Robert Stroud, mysteriously disappears, Sloan uncovers a greedy plot hatched by the women in Stroud's life. It's a murderous plan ripe with blackmail and betrayal--and a shockingly twisted conclusion!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Now you see it, now you don't. A despised lawyer turns up murdered at Community General and before the police can arrive, the body mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a tasty tale for the t.v. tabloids when Community General's most famous patient attractive t.v. star, Pamela, is caught on tape fleeing the murder scene of ex-husband number four.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a strange twist of fate when millionaire William Bissell, checks into the hospital and stumbles upon his ex-lover, Nurse Jenny Morgan. After Bissell's found murdered by lethal injection, Jenny becomes the number one suspect.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Skilled assassins set their sights on the Federal task force headed by Walker.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Alex comes down with a case of baby fever after a frightened young mother abandons her infant son with the caring DA. Elsewhere, the Rangers follow a trail of dead bodies to the leader of a vicious gang of ex-convicts.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A woman (Dionne Warwick) seeks the Rangers' help in tracking down a hijacked ambulance, which carries her dying granddaughter's donor liver.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker takes a troubled youth (Nicolas Gonzalez) under his wing after the boy's parents die in a tragic accident; Sydney and Gage go undercover as ravers to bust a gang of drug dealers.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Gage finds himself in a deadly situation after accepting a ride from a pair of escaped convicts - one a "thrill killer," the other a victim of a setup.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and old buddy Jack Dalton are arrested in France after becoming unwitting accomplices in an international jewel heist.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver helps a promising young hockey player tone down his aggressive style of play and possibly reclaim his position on Team USA, America's ice hockey team.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is marked for death after stopping the construction of a proposed marina and unknowingly falls in love with the hired killer sent to stop him.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Robbie's guitar playing and singing makes him at hit at the local coffeehouse.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Steve admires the beautiful and shy owner of a local café.

programme.desc: Robbie starts to develop feelings for Sally, Mike's fiance.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: A TV hypnotist picks Robbie out of the audience to participate, but back at home Bub ends up hypnotized instead.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Mike finally gets to meet Sally's father for the first time but disaster ensues.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: A nurse attends to more than Robbie's broken leg.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: A broken marriage gives Mike and Sally a lot to think about.

programme.title: My Three Sons

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson sees large footprints in his yard caused by Dennis' new novelty shoes and thinks they may be from a monster that has been reported in the newspaper.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Dennis decides to help along a potential romance between an older friend of his and a new girl in town.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Dennis is appointed by the mayor to go to Washington to ask their senator to support the creation of a national forest at nearby Hickory Mountain.

programme.desc: The star player on Dennis' basketball team, Stretch, quits the team because Johnny Brady and some of the other players constantly make fun of him.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Mrs. Wilson knits several baby booties to use as covers for a new set of golf clubs, and Dennis quickly spreads word around the neighborhood.

programme.desc: Mr. Wilson wins an essay contest that requires the entrants to be parents, so he tries to pass off Dennis and his friends as his own children.

programme.desc: The boys refuse to share their clubhouse with the girls.

programme.desc: Marcia nominates Mike for a Father of the Year award.

programme.desc: The Brady kids fight over what to buy with their trading stamps.

programme.desc: Mike and Carol plan a camping trip for the whole family.

programme.desc: Bobby runs away when he feels underappreciated and unloved.

programme.desc: Carol gets laryngitis right before singing at the Christmas service.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police solve a murder when divers find a skeleton in a car at the bottom of a river, and a dead dog's DNA helps crack open a 6-year-old case.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Work of an Alberta, Canada detective finally pays off when he tracks down the man who murdered a 6-year-old girl 10 years earlier. And when police search for the killer of a hitchhiker, they find that the victim's diary is one of their best clues.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: The longest-running cold case of a law enforcement officer in the United States was the murder of Sheriff's Lt. Joe Clark.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: On February 2, 2010, two masked gunmen commit a violent robbery and shoot Michael Temple Jr., rendering him a quadriplegic for five years before his death. In this unusual cold case, DNA is used to create a sketch of the killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A police investigator discovers a letter written 16 years earlier that provides clues to a woman's murder. And a firearms expert supplies the evidence that South Carolina authorities need to put a man on trial in 2002 for a murder committed in 1961.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A mother is suspected in the murders of two of her daughters when her third daughter finally convinces police to reopen two cold cases.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: With access to the San Francisco Police Department's work, including saliva samples taken from letters the infamous Zodiac Killer sent 30 years ago, we reevaluate the case of the serial killer who began terrorizing California in the late 1960s.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In a city of eight million, landlord Bruce Blackwood disappears without a trace in March 2006. Though there is no body, the NYPD is sure this is a homicide and they spend the next nine years searching for answers.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When a 30-year-old mother fails to report for duty in Virginia, the Army lists her as AWOL. Her family immediately suspects foul play. They embark on a 13-year quest for answers before an eyewitness blows the case wide open.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Nine years after the murders of a mother and her teenage daughters, a wiretapped conversation helps police to crack the case. And the baffling murder of a Virginia woman is solved when human bones are discovered by a geologist in North Carolina.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: When a church deacon is found shot to death it looks like police may have stumbled upon a multi-party murder plot. And, a wife remains a key suspect in her husband's murder case for six years, until she attempts to prove her own innocence.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When 23-year-old Tonya McKinley is found brutally murdered on New Years Day 1985, a little boy is left motherless. A family must wait 35 years for advancements in forensic science to finally catch a killer using familial DNA.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: It takes nine years and the work of cutting-edge forensic toxicologists to solve the murder of a medical examiner's wife. Then, a determined Alabama sheriff reopens the case of the deaths of two babies, hoping to get their mother to confess.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: March 1984. Jack Kennedy discovers his daughters brutally murdered. Their mother and niece spend their lives keeping the case alive. DNA leads nowhere. 30 years later, an informant gives up a name.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Harriet Tubman provides military intel to the Union Army, Virginia Hall spies in France during World War II and becomes the first woman in the CIA, and Roald Dahl serves as a debonair British spy. Featuring Octavia Spencer, Alia Shawkat and Will Ferrell.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Wayne Wheeler becomes the face of Prohibition, Dorothy Fuldheim breaks barriers in news broadcasting, and Muhammad Ali refuses to fight in the Vietnam War. Featuring Gaius Charles, Samm Levine, Mary Elizabeth Ellis, George Wallace and Ron Funches.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Vigilantes led by Andres Pico enact street justice, Rin Tin Tin becomes the world's biggest movie star, and the construction of the L.A. aqueduct brings riches to city officials. Featuring Jack Black, Kyle Gass, Ryan Phillippe and Giancarlo Esposito.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Nellie Bly and Elizabeth Bisland try to travel around the world in under 80 days, and Thomas Nast's political cartoons lead to the downfall of Tammany Hall leader "Boss" Tweed. Featuring Michael Cera, Ellie Kemper, Natasha Leggero and Jason Alexander.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Kentucky Daisy stakes a claim to land, Gordon Cooper overcomes mechanical issues on a one-man space mission, and African-American Deputy Marshal Bass Reeves is the inspiration for the Lone Ranger. Featuring Kat Dennings, Colin Hanks and Jaleel White.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Milton Bradley popularizes board games, Roger Sharpe helps overturn a pinball ban, and chess master Bobby Fischer defeats Russian rival Boris Spassky during the Cold War. Featuring Topher Grace, Zach Gilford, Taran Killam and Jake Johnson.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Popé leads the Pueblo Indians in a revolt, Boy Scouts founder Ernest Thompson Seton tracks a wolf, and the truth behind the Roswell UFO conspiracy is revealed. Featuring Colin Hanks, Jason Mantzoukas, Rob Huebel, Tom Lennon and Patton Oswalt.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Alexander Graham Bell steals the original design for the telephone from Elisha Gray, and Thomas Edison tries to create a movie-making monopoly. Featuring Parker Posey, Chris Parnell, Jason Ritter, Martin Starr, Michael McKean and Henry Winkler.

programme.desc: En el año 2000, el cuerpo de la bailarina exótica Rachel Siani fue encontrado debajo de un puente de Nueva Jersey. Los investigadores se preguntaron si se había suicidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía de Virginia Beach llegó al departamento de Makdessi para encontrar los cuerpos ensangrentados de Elise Makdessi y de Quincy Brown, un soldado de la Marina. ¿Pero era el amante de Elise o su agresor?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Dawn Bruce, de 22 años, es brutalmente asesinada en su apartamento de Virginia. Los investigadores notan una mancha de sangre en la funda de una almohada que parece haber sido hecha por uno de los dedos del asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los residentes de Noel, Missouri, se sorprendieron al enterarse de que su banco había sido asaltado y el presidente del banco había desaparecido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1998, una actuación de asesinato misterioso en Maryland se convierte en una verdadera novela policíaca cuando se descubre el cuerpo gravemente quemado de Stephen Hricko en su habitación de hotel.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El asesinato de un turista estadounidense en un centro turístico mexicano centró los recursos policiales en ambos lados de la frontera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue uno de los crímenes más descarados del siglo 20. Adolph Coors III, el ejecutivo de Coors Brewing Company, fue secuestrado y retenido para un rescate.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El 20 de Mayo del 2001, Carrie Nelson fue golpeado hasta su muerte mientras trabajaba en unas oficinas comerciales. El caso quedó sin resolver durante seis años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una estudiante universitaria desaparece, sus compañeros de clase estaban preocupados por la seguridad de ella y la de ellos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: La pista ardiente
programme.desc: Un pirómano en serie anda suelto en Washington, DC. Cada uno de los incendios se inició con el mismo tipo de dispositivo incendiario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Lisa Manderach y su hija Devon dejaron su casa para ir de compras, pero no regresaron a la hora que se esperaba. El esposo de Lisa, Jimmy, llamó a la policía lleno de pánico para denunciar su desaparición y los dirigió a un centro comercial cercano.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía sospecha del Dr. John Jack Boyle en la desaparición de su esposa, Noreen, cuando firma los papeles de la hipoteca de una nueva casa con una mujer que se hace pasar por su esposa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de doce años reclama que ha sido secuestrada y abusada sexualmente. Ella contó lo que había pasado con voz calma, sin alteraciones ni emociones, lo que hizo difícil que la policía le creyera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Edward Post preparó un baño para su esposa antes de salir a correr. Regresó y la encontró sin respirar. Murió antes de que llegara la ambulancia. La policía consideró su muerte como accidental hasta que surgió un motivo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El caso musical
programme.desc: En 1999, una niña de 12 años fue encontrada asesinada en su casa y cambió la sensación de seguridad que tenían los residentes de la pequeña ciudad de Waseca, Minnesota.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Nadie en una tranquila comunidad residencial vio nada inusual el día en que uno de sus vecinos fue brutalmente atacado y asesinado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de inspeccionar el daño de una tormenta en un hogar en Tampa, un asesor de seguros simplemente desapareció. Treinta horas después, su cuerpo apareció en un río cercano. Pero el asesino había sido descuidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una joven pareja decidió celebrar su primer aniversario de bodas con un viaje de campamento a Mount Hood.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un vecino vio cómo un hombre apuñalaba a su esposa, la empujaba a la piscina y le metía la cabeza bajo el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía obtiene una pista sobre una pareja que desapareció en el fin de semana del Día de los Caídos durante un robo en marcha. La evidencia que se encuentra resuelve el brutal crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pista elemental
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres del mismo pueblo fueron asesinadas de la misma manera, la policía temió que un asesino en serie estuviera suelto.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter begins a relationship with Mia and a friendship with Riley. Finding a balance between a new girlfriend and a new guy friend gets confusing, especially when Riley is suddenly kissing Peter.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.desc: Mia’s T-Bombz campaign is hitting the city and Degrassi. But Holly J has bigger and better things going on. She’s prepping the Power Squad for an out-of-town competition, and things are looking good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner and Jane have plans for next year – she’ll start pre-law and he’ll attend Police College. When he doesn’t get in, he can’t bear to tell her, so he lies.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Desperate to win Jane back, Spinner sneaks into the Leadership Convention Jane is speaking at and proposes. When Jane turns him down, Spinner breaks up with her – nothing he does is ever good enough.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Pushed to the edge by Holly J, Alli begins posting nasty things about her on the “anti-Grapevine” blog, the underground school on-line site.

programme.desc: Jane admits to herself that her issues with her dad go deeper than the divorce – she thinks maybe he did things to her. Jane is very confused and feels alone. Lucas gives Jane a hard time for creating tension between mom and dad.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan meets the mummies of Tutankhamun's parents at the Egyptian Museum in Cairo, and discovers that they were actually brother and sister. CT scans reveal how this incestuous relationship could have been responsible for Tutankhamun's poor health.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Picking up the story in 1323BC, the pharaoh sustains the injury that would eventually kill him. Dan investigates a scan of Tutankhamun's skeleton, while John visits Howard Carter's house and probes the 1920s craze of `Tutmania'.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan discovers a series of anomalies in Tutankhamun's burial, and spots that the faces on his coffins and canopic jars do not match that of the famous golden mask. Raksha looks at Seti's tomb, which shows how hurried Tutankhamun's was in comparison.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest vanishing acts in history. More than 3,000 years ago a mysterious and ruthless civilisation rose from nothing, created a brutal and unstoppable army and built an empire that rivalled Egypt and Babylon.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke tells the story of Ancient Egyptian art and how it reflected the civilisation's religion, through thirty extraordinary masterpieces.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke explores the sumptuous treasures of the Golden Age of Egyptian art, starting with troubling psychological portraits of tyrant king Senwosret III, and ending with the golden mask of boy-king Tutankhamun.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: From the statues of Rameses II to the final flourishes under Queen Cleopatra, Sooke discovers that the subsequent invasions by foreign rulers, from the Nubians and Alexander the Great to the Romans, produced a new hybrid art full of surprise.

programme.title: Secrets of the Pyramids

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A professional dog groomer reaches out to Cesar for help with three of her toughest clients; Cesar helps a couple with their head-strong pitbull.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Puppy mills produce millions of dogs; Ceaser works with an animal rights group to rescue and rehabilitate some pups.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Millan helps Suzie Dove Miles, who has recently adopted a Doberman who is fearful of literally everything.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Family dogs brawl with each other; a dog torments a child; a five-legged miniature pinscher has an aggressive attitude.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar attempts to introduce Roscoe, an agoraphobic Akita who is too scared to leave the house and garden and has never been for a walk, to the outside world.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps the owner of a grooming business deal with difficult canine clients; a Chihuahua has a barking problem.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie is overprotective of his owner; a German shepherd is aggressive toward other dogs and people.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd/pit bull mix with severe aggression issues; a boxer's owners are concerned by her tendency to jump the six-foot backyard fence.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a man get over a fear of dogs so he can finally fulfill his children's request to adopt one of their own.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps actor and comedian Kathy Griffin with her two rescue dogs, Chance and Pom Pom, who are disobedient and territorial.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two troubled dogs, and their families, win sessions with Cesar after auditioning at a pet store in Orange County, Calif.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Doberman/Lab and a pit bull develop behavioral issues after not being walked for months; an Italian greyhound acts aggressively toward the men of the house.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Dave Glassman adopts pit bulls Blackjack and Memphis together, but one day during a barking fit, the two dogs turn on each other.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar works to dial down the bad behaviors of four problem dogs who won sessions at the PETCO auditions.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After releasing the second part of his autobiography, Dog and his family traveled across America, and this very special episode offers an intimate portrait of both the public and private moments of that journey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is still on the search for the elusive fugitive, Marco. Dog has been tracking him across Colorado, from Grand Junction to Denver, and now a hot tip that a long time associate of his is hiding in Pueblo sends the team racing south.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The trail is hot and the stakes is high for Dog and the posse. The "Big Fish" in this case is Marco, an alleged drug dealer with a big bond. But a major key to catching him is Elizabeth, who is also a fugitive from the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted. And a Samoan, Siamau, is convinced to fly back to Hawaii from L.A.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court, and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow, Dog turns to the fugitive's on again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The boys get distracted by the bikini-clad lovelies on Waikiki when they hunt for Lucy, a homeless, alcoholic fugitive. Beth is amused by the boys, but this is serious business: Tim will have to pay the bond if Lucy isn't caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive is hard to pin down in Honolulu's downtown district, moving from hostel to hotel to apartment high-rise. But as the hunt evolves, Dog discovers that this alleged burglar isn't the only family member wanted by the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog faces a tough personal and professional situation when he must hunt down his friend, Ili, who has helped him on many busts. But now Ili's on the other side of the law, and now Dog must bring her in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Interpreting Alexis' vendetta against Blake as a love/hate relationship, Dex tells Alexis he is through being taken for granted by her; Sammy suspects Virginia may not be as naive as she wants people to think.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle agrees to have her operation, but only after Blake signs her divorce papers and living will, to be enacted if the surgery is not a success; Fallon is haunted by recurring dreams of Roger Grimes.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle's operation is unsuccessful and she slips into a coma. Told she will probably never recover, a grieving Blake returns to Denver; Sammy Jo is attacked by an unknown assailant; Dex discovers Joanna is a link to Alexis' controller, Heath.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fearing that his darkest secret will be revealed because of the search for Roger Grimes's murderer, Blake vows to take the rap to put an end to the investigation; Dex and Sable both go after Heath.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sammy Jo recognizes Gibson as the man Krystle saw in her nightmares, and Blake vows to protect his family secret with his life; Adam discovers Virginia's secret past; Blake entrusts Dex with documents relating to their family's secret.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis hires a mercenary to get her ships back; Adam and Jeff exchange blows after he accuses Adam of being disloyal to Blake; Dex begins to doubt Alexis can ever offer him the kind of love he needs.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sable tries to convince Blake she is on his side. Dex is attracted by her loyalty; Sammy Jo's interest in Tanner McBride intensifies; Dex attacks Adam after learning he took advantage of Virginia; Joanna becomes jealous of Sable's interest in Dex.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sable persuades Heath not to kill her. Upset by her close encounter with death, she goes to Dex for comfort; Alexis goes to Paris to keep an eye on Boyd's commando operation to retrieve her oil tankers.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake resumes control of Denver-Carrington and fires Adam; Joanna accepts Adam's offer to work for him and Alexis; Zorelli confesses his love to Fallon, but she remains confused by her feelings toward him.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis gets her revenge on Sable when she tells her tankers have sunk; Alexis is devastated when she discovers Dex slept with Sable; as Sammy Jo becomes increasingly fond of Tanner McBride, she is unaware that he is married.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis is emotionally crushed by Dex's affair with Sable; Blake tells Dex and Sable beneath the lake is a Nazi treasure and his father killed Grimes to prevent him from exploiting it; Adam tries to win back Blake's trust so he can spy for Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sable unleashes her lawsuit against Alexis; Dex dives into the hidden vault beneath the lake and finds it empty; Zorelli tracks down the uncle of Dominique Devereaux, learning he knows something about Grimes' murder; Alexis leaves for Switzerland.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake is a suspect in Elsworth Chisolm's apparent murder; Zorelli is put back on the Grimes case; Charles Matthews warns Blake that Zorelli has been asking him questions about Blake's father.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff and Dex meet with Roger Grimes' wife and learn he has a son; Sable is pregnant and unable to tell Dex that he is the father; Adam has a picture of Jeff and Monica retouched to appear incestuous and then submits it to a sleazy tabloid.

programme.title: ET Vault Unlocked

programme.desc: A college freshman must choose between his father's vision of what his future should be his own conflicting instincts.

programme.desc: The Angels battle Satan over the fate of an unborn child.

programme.desc: An ex-filmmaker, who lost his faith in God earlier in life following a tragic accident, must help a young film student rediscover hers.

programme.desc: With a disastrous tornado heading straight for a small town, Monica is dispatched to help a bitter storm chaser who is intent on fighting nature.

programme.desc: The Angels help a couple save their marriage when it hits a serious turning point

programme.desc: While trying to get through to a troubled young drug addict, Monica tells her the legend of Billie Holiday and her powerful song about lynchings in the South.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels help a seemingly perfect family when a teenager learns a damaging secret about his father.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels must help a businessman whose career is threatened realize what matters most in life.

programme.title: Bangkok Dog
programme.desc: Special agent Andrew Kang intercepts a drug shipment and goes undercover in Bangkok's criminal underworld. Posing as a cartel operative, he must gain the gang's trust, but as the lines blur, he risks losing himself—and his way out.

programme.title: Gladiator Underground
programme.desc: Two brothers compete in the world’s deadliest underground fighting tournament where they must decide whether to play by the rules or to cast their honor aside and team up to bring down the dark syndicate running the tournament.

programme.title: The Raid: Redemption
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Jakarta's slums lies a drug-gang’s safe house, home to some of the most terrifying and ruthless fighters in the city. Arriving before dawn, an elite swat team moves in to take down the notorious drug lord that runs it.

programme.title: The Raid 2 (Subtitled)
programme.desc: Following immediately after the events of THE RAID, Rama (Iko Uwais) is forced to reinvent himself as an undercover cop in order to provide protection for his wife and child.

programme.title: Merantau
programme.desc: Leaving the simple life in rural West Sumatera, Yuda must undergo merantau, the traditional rite of passage in which a young man must leave his family’s home to make it on his own.

programme.title: The Raid: Redemption
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Jakarta's slums lies a drug-gang’s safe house, home to some of the most terrifying and ruthless fighters in the city. Arriving before dawn, an elite swat team moves in to take down the notorious drug lord that runs it.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, teenager Tara Munsey went missing after a work shift at a Virginia restaurant. Did she run away, or was she the victim of foul play?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In rural Canada, Dr. John Schneeberger is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting one of his female patients and his step daughter. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the patient insists that he sedated and raped her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, the death of Crystal Purcell was considered an accident. Then in 2001, Barbara Purcell called police to suggest that her estranged husband had killed Crystal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, police struggle to identify a suspect. Some fibers and a study of the weather patterns on the night of the murder break the case open and reveal the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Faced with three homicides that appear to be professional executions, investigators on both sides of the Atlantic must find a common thread between the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student vanished without a trace, her fellow students were concerned about her safety and their own.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, 19-year-old Shannon Melendi disappeared while at Emory University. Her disappearance remained a mystery for ten years, until new scientific testing cast a different light on Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Residents of Noel, Missouri were stunned to learn that their bank had been robbed and the bank president was missing. His body was later found floating in a lake, securely bound to a chair with duct tape.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: 6-year-old Nicole Rae Walker was killed in a hit-and-run in her Ft. Lauderdale neighborhood. The prosecutor combines the talents of an accident reconstruction expert with a video specialist to create a graphic demonstration of the moment of impact.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this international case of extortion, murder and stolen identities, scam-artist Albert J. Walker assumes the identity of co-worker Ronald Platt. Platt later turns up dead in an ocean with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, Judy Southern arrived home from work and was shot by a gunman waiting within. Her husband arrived shortly afterwards, called emergency services and drove her to the hospital.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When four-month-old Ryan Stallings dies under suspicious circumstances, his mother is ultimately convicted of his murder. But months later, new evidence emerges from a startling source — his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 10 bodies turn up in Florida, one victim — 17-year-old Lisa McVey — is abducted but released. She leads police to the perpertrator, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Post drew a bath for his wife before going for a run. He returned to find her not breathing. She died before emergency response arrived. Police considered her death accidental until a motive surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Maine resident Pearl Smith goes missing after an argument with her husband, Bill Bruns. When investigators find a blood trail that leads to the couple's basement, police are sure they'll find the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a day of fishing in a quiet village in Switzerland, a teenage boy doesn't return home as planned. The investigation reveals some important microscopic evidence in the water near where he was last seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35, was convicted of killing David Nixon in April 2002 after he planned to end their relationship.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A surgeon is stabbed to death and the most likely suspect is seen in a restaurant at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, nursing student Tamika Huston went missing from her Spartanburg, South Carolina home. A tip led detectives to her car, where they found an unknown house key that could help solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, the dead bodies of Joan Rogers and her two teenage daughters were found floating in Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A behavioral profile caused the Baton Rouge Police Department to search for the wrong man. The real perpetrator may have eluded arrest, had it not been for a molecular biologist who painted DNA picture of the suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young fireman died from what appeared to be serious but undiagnosed heart disease, his family and friends had no proof of foul play.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Master Vile uses Dischordia to try to control the Pink and Yellow Rangers with her voice.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Master Vile turns back time to gain control of Earth and turn the Rangers into helpless children.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita’s green candle is still burning and slowly draining Tommy's powers. The only way to stop Rita from gaining the Green Ranger's power is for someone to go into the Dark Dimension and retrieve the candle.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En los años ochenta, el comercio de drogas hizo estragos en los vecindarios dentro de la ciudad de Chicago, y los crímenes violentos amenazaban con destruir comunidades enteras.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un depredador escurridizo estaba suelto en el rural sur de California: alguien que secuestraba mujeres del frente de sus casas a plena luz del día.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1980, el FBI comenzó una extensa búsqueda de operación encubierta, de nombre en código "Safebet", que fue diseñada para exponer la infiltración de la mafia de Chicago en los alrededores de los suburbios de la ciudad.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En febrero de 1996, el millonario de Nueva Jersey Frank Black viajó a Florida para cerrar un trato de negocios importante antes de su retiro.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Después de que un criminal con trayectoria cometiera un homicidio vehicular en Nueva Orleans, los agentes del FBI lo rastrearon por medio de sus hábitos y adicciones.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Anchorage, Alaska, una madre joven y sus dos hijas fueron violadas y brutalmente asesinadas. Solo había una pieza de evidencia forense: una toalla con ladillas que el asesino usó para limpiarse después del crimen.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En una fría tarde de 1989, la capitana de la Marina Shirley Russel desapareció de Quantico, Virginia. La capitana Russel era una oficial dedicada; sus amigos y colegas estaban seguros de que no se había ausentado sin permiso.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando la policía en una pequeña comunidad del estado de Washington comenzó a investigar la desaparición de una mujer de 22 años, no tenían manera de saber que se transformaría en una persecución a nivel nacional de un sádico sexual.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Boston, agentes del FBI y la policía local rastrearon a una banda de ladrones que se especializaban en el desmantelamiento de vehículos blindados.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En octubre de 1987, un oficial de policía de Boston que respondió a una llamada por un altercado doméstico fue herido de muerte. Las autoridades hicieron una persecución a lo largo de la ciudad, pero solo pudieron encontrar las huellas del sospechoso.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1986, la pequeña ciudad sin crímenes de Indiana se tornó violenta por la llegada de un extraño muy peligroso. Después de que un oficial fuera baleado a quemarropa, el asesino psicótico llevó a los investigadores a través del Medio Oeste.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El robo a un camión blindado en Nueva York en 1981 dejó a un guardia muerto y a otro herido de gravedad. La policía detuvo a unos sospechosos en las cercanías y se produjo otra balacera que costó las vidas de dos oficiales.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.desc: After a flashback of when Jay first meets Master Wu, Jay awakens to find he’s still with his caged friends returning from their hunting party. Forced into slave labor, Jay’s inspired by his dream of his master when Wu told him to ‘build the impossible’.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As NINJAGO City rebuilds, Faith arrives with a dire warning: the Oni have returned and are destroying the realms, one by one. NINJAGO must prepare, and Lloyd must face the possibility that to defeat this foe, he may need the help of another enemy.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Having learned Master Wu is the "Treacherous One," the ninjas find themselves under siege at the Monastery, trying to protect Wu from the wrath of Aspheera.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninjas must break into the Explorer's Club to obtain the Second Scroll of Forbidden Spinjitzu, running afoul of the club's manager and irate club-members.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Aspheera arrives at the Monastery of Spinjitzu and confronts Wu, forcing one of the ninjas to make a heroic sacrifice.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Having learned Zane is not dead, Master Wu prepares to go after him, but Lloyd and the other ninjas take matters into their own hands and defy their Master.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninjas arrive in the Never-Realm, where they quickly find themselves overwhelmed; luckily, they are taken in by a tribe of Ice Fishers who tell them Zane has been imprisoned by the evil Ice Emperor.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ice Emperor learns of the ninjas' arrival and sends his Blizzard Samurai warriors to destroy them and the villagers who sheltered them.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd runs afoul of the Ice Emperor's Blizzard Samurai but is rescued by a strange wolf, with whom an unlikely friendship develops.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago City, three criminals learn of the ninjas' absence and stage a breakout of Kryptarium Prison, telling tall tales of how they were captured as they go.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd and his wolf companion find a cave with the mech inside and a message from Zane that provides a clue to his fate.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Guilt-ridden over having lost the Traveler's Tea, Cole embarks on a dangerous quest to the top of a nearby mountain in hopes of finding the legendary Traveler's Tree, a tree which is supposedly guarded by a fearsome beast.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
